---
title: 'Attempt Of Leo'
author: 'Leo Zhang'
date: '2026-03-31'
output: pdf_document
---


## Introduction


```{r, echo = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(tidy = TRUE, tidy.opts = list(width.cutoff = 20))
library(forecast)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

```


## First Model


```{r, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

```
